reviews.review_description: there are lots of free anime songs, and this is the only one thing better than pianovision.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your honest feedback. We're thrilled to hear you enjoyed the music and found value in Sigure compared to other apps! We sincerely apologize that the design didn't meet your expectations. We are constantly working on updates, and your feedback about the UI/UX is very helpful for our future improvements. Stay tuned for better versions!
